# Central Saudi Arabia

**Summary**: The geographic region where the study's target field is located.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1999-iddris|Iddris, 1999]] focused on a field in central Saudi Arabia producing super-light oil.

- [[2014-sami|Sami, 2014]] conducted field studies in central-saudi-arabia to analyze the Upper Khartam Member.

- [[2015-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2015]] conducted field studies in Central Saudi Arabia to analyze carbonate reservoirs.

- [[2016-babker|Babker, 2016]] conducted field studies in the central-saudi-arabia region to evaluate outcrop analogues.

- [[2016-malik|Malik, 2016]] conducted study in the Dhruma Formation located in Central Saudi Arabia.

- [[2016-makkawi|Makkawi, 2016]] studied the Khuff Formation outcrops in central Saudi Arabia.

- [[2017-adam-2|Adam, 2017]] studied outcrops in central Saudi Arabia.

- [[2017-yousif|Yousif, 2017]] conducted outcrop studies in the Dhruma Formation within the central-saudi-arabia region.

- [[2018-ismanto|Ismanto, 2018]] studied the Dhruma Formation in central Saudi Arabia.

- [[2020-al-zoukani|Al-Zoukani, 2020]] studied the dhruma-formation in central-saudi-arabia.

- [[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021]] studied the carbonate formations in Central Saudi Arabia.

- [[2022-khamsin|Khamsin, 2022]] studied foraminifera in the Dhruma Formation, Central Region of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2022-syahputra|Syahputra, 2022]] conducted field studies in central-saudi-arabia.

- [[2022-bashri|Bashri, 2022]] studied outcrops in central Saudi Arabia to develop a conceptual depositional model.

- [[2022-babker|Babker, 2022]] studied outcrops in central-sardinia to understand regional lithofacies distribution.

- [[2024-saraih|Saraih, 2024]] conducted field studies in the Khanasir Member located 130 km southeast of Riyadh.

- [[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024]] conducted research within the central-saudi-arabia region to map Jurassic formations.

## Geological and Structural Setting



- [[2014-sami|Sami, 2014]] conducted field studies in central-saudi-arabia to analyze the Upper Khartam Member.

- [[2015-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2015]] conducted field studies in Central Saudi Arabia to analyze carbonate reservoirs.

- [[2016-babker|Babker, 2016]] conducted field studies in the central-saudi-arabia region to evaluate outcrop analogues.

- [[2016-malik|Malik, 2016]] conducted study in the Dhruma Formation located in Central Saudi Arabia.

- [[2016-makkawi|Makkawi, 2016]] studied the Khuff Formation outcrops in central Saudi Arabia.

- [[2017-adam-2|Adam, 2017]] studied outcrops in central Saudi Arabia.

- [[2017-yousif|Yousif, 2017]] conducted outcrop studies in the Dhruma Formation within the central-saudi-arabia region.

- [[2018-ismanto|Ismanto, 2018]] studied the Dhruma Formation in central Saudi Arabia.

- [[2020-al-zoukani|Al-Zoukani, 2020]] studied the dhruma-formation in central-saudi-arabia.

- [[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021]] studied the carbonate formations in Central Saudi Arabia.

- [[2022-khamsin|Khamsin, 2022]] studied foraminifera in the Dhruma Formation, Central Region of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2022-syahputra|Syahputra, 2022]] conducted field studies in central-saudi-arabia.

- [[2022-bashri|Bashri, 2022]] studied outcrops in central Saudi Arabia to develop a conceptual depositional model.

- [[2022-babker|Babker, 2022]] studied outcrops in central-sardinia to understand regional lithofacies distribution.

## Formations Present



## Key Findings From This Location

- The field produces 52 degree API crude oil. ([[1999-iddris|Iddris, 1999, p. 19]])

- The outcrop provides an excellent analog for the upper parts of the Khuff-A reservoirs. ([[2014-sami|Sami, 2014, p. 75]])

- Not stated in source ([[2015-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2015]])

- The Sarah Formation is well exposed in the Al-Qaseem area, providing a suitable outcrop analogue for subsurface evaluation. ([[2016-babker|Babker, 2016, p. 18]])

- The outcrop is situated approximately 35km from the main Riyadh-Makkah Highway. ([[2016-malik|Malik, 2016, p. 24]])

- The study area includes a 1200km long belt of outcrops extending N-S. ([[2016-makkawi|Makkawi, 2016, p. 22]])

- Outcrops provide a continuous stratigraphic context for the Khuff formation. ([[2017-adam-2|Adam, 2017, p. 77]])

- Outcrop sections were located near Khashm Mi'dad area, southwest of Riyadh city. ([[2017-yousif|Yousif, 2017, p. 158]])

- Outcrops are well-exposed about 60 kilometers west of Riyadh. ([[2018-ismanto|Ismanto, 2018, p. 57]])

- Outcrops of the Dhruma Formation are exposed approximately 50 km west of Riyadh City. ([[2020-al-zoukani|Al-Zoukani, 2020, p. 1]])

- Not stated in source ([[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021]])

- Samples were collected from three outcrops near the reference section at Khashm ad Dhibi. ([[2022-khamsin|Khamsin, 2022, p. 23]])

- The Hanifa Formation is exposed along a 700 km belt in Central Saudi Arabia. ([[2022-syahputra|Syahputra, 2022, p. 30]])

- Study area includes a 535 km-long N-S transect of the Hanifa Formation. ([[2022-bashri|Bashri, 2022, p. 19]])

- The study area covers a 1000 km belt of the Khuff Formation. ([[2022-babker|Babker, 2022, p. 14]])

- The study area provides a well-exposed outcrop for analyzing burrow and fracture characteristics. ([[2024-saraih|Saraih, 2024, p. 78]])

- The Dhruma Formation provides essential data for regional biostratigraphic correlation and hydrocarbon exploration. ([[2024-jalloh|Jalloh, 2024, p. 112]])
